service.name: Elsevier Scopus API
service.description_for_ai: World largest abstract and citation database. 87M+ records from 24K+ journals. Article search, author profiles, journal metrics, citation analysis, h-index, affiliation data. Used by researchers and librarians worldwide. Requires institutional access or developer key.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://dev.elsevier.com — free developer key, institutional IP required for full access
auth.cost: Free developer key. Full access requires Scopus subscription

capabilities.description_for_ai: World largest abstract and citation database. 87M+ records from 24K+ journals. Article search, author profiles, journal metrics, citation analysis, h-index, affiliation data. Used by researchers and librarians worldwide. Requires institutional access or developer key. Search Scopus database for peer-reviewed articles by keyword, author, journal, DOI, affiliation.

query.description: Scopus query e.g. TITLE-ABS-KEY(machine learning) AND PUBYEAR > 2020
